name: Global baseline qualification review
change_note: Align applicant role tokens with canonical list; add expiry/renewal monitoring requirement.

requirements.requirement: Confirm the applicant is eligible for the selected platform, marketplace site, and seller route.
requirements.decision_effect: Missing or unsupported seller eligibility prevents approval.
requirements.notes: Verify official platform policy for the exact marketplace site.

requirements.requirement: Applicant legal name must match submitted entity documents or have a clear authorization chain.
evidence_expected: authorization document if applicant differs from rights holder
requirements.decision_effect: Major mismatch is high severity and normally requires more information or rejection.
requirements.notes: Use official company registry when available.

requirements.requirement: Brand ownership or authorization must cover product scope, territory, marketplace/channel, and review period.
requirements.decision_effect: Missing or out-of-scope authorization is high severity.
requirements.notes: Trademark territory and class should be checked in the relevant official registry when decision depends on it.

requirements.requirement: Product category must not be prohibited by the platform or destination country.
requirements.decision_effect: Confirmed prohibited category is critical and leads to rejection.
requirements.notes: If uncertain, escalate human review for high-risk categories.

requirements.requirement: Product compliance documents must match the product name, SKU/model, manufacturing site, certificate scope, and destination market.
requirements.decision_effect: Mismatch or expired evidence is high severity if the category requires certification.
requirements.notes: Exact evidence depends on category and market.

requirements.requirement: Labels, warnings, language, and claims must be compatible with the destination market and platform listing rules.
requirements.decision_effect: Unsubstantiated or regulated claims can require rejection or human escalation.
requirements.notes: Medical, therapeutic, antimicrobial, child-safety, food, supplement, and cosmetic claims require extra caution.

requirements.requirement: Expiry dates and renewal obligations for licenses, certificates, and authorizations are recorded.
requirements.decision_effect: Unknown validity of a core document prevents approval until confirmed.
requirements.notes: Feeds renewal monitoring after the decision.

sources.title: Amazon Seller Central: Restricted products
sources.confirms: Marketplace restricted product policy must be checked before listing products that may be illegal, unsafe, or otherwise restricted.

sources.title: TikTok Shop Seller Center: Prohibited Products Policy
sources.confirms: Marketplace prohibited product policy must be checked before listing illegal, unsafe, counterfeit, recalled, or regulated products.

sources.title: TikTok Shop Seller Center: Content Policy
sources.confirms: Marketplace content policy can restrict false, misleading, inconsistent, illegal, or unauthorized brand/IP claims.

sources.title: Temu: Terms of Use
sources.confirms: Marketplace terms require users and sellers to comply with applicable laws and platform rules.

sources.title: GLEIF: LEI Search
sources.confirms: LEI records can support legal entity name and registration verification where the entity has an LEI.

sources.title: OpenCorporates: The Open Database Of The Corporate World
sources.confirms: Corporate registry aggregation can help route reviewers to legal entity records, but final verification should use the official registry where available.

sources.title: WIPO: Global Brand Database
sources.confirms: Trademark owner, status, class, and territory should be checked in official trademark databases when brand rights affect a decision.

sources.title: USPTO: Trademark Search
sources.confirms: U.S. trademark status, owner, class, and goods/services can be checked through USPTO trademark search.

sources.title: EUIPO: eSearch plus
sources.confirms: EU trademark and design records can be checked through EUIPO eSearch plus.

sources.title: European Commission: Safety Gate
sources.confirms: EU Safety Gate provides official alerts for dangerous non-food products and supports recall/safety screening.

sources.title: CPSC: Recalls
sources.confirms: CPSC recall records support safety and recall screening for consumer products.

sources.title: European Commission: CE marking
sources.confirms: CE marking indicates that a product has been assessed to meet EU safety, health, and environmental protection requirements where applicable.

sources.title: FCC: Equipment Authorization
sources.confirms: FCC equipment authorization applies to radiofrequency devices before marketing, importation, or operation in the United States.

sources.title: FDA: How to Start a Food Business
sources.confirms: FDA routes food businesses to applicable facility registration, labeling, import, and food safety responsibilities.

sources.title: FDA: Food Labeling & Nutrition
sources.confirms: FDA maintains U.S. food labeling and nutrition information, including label requirements and guidance.

sources.title: ISO: Certification
sources.confirms: ISO explains that ISO does not perform certification itself and that certificates should be checked with certification bodies where certification is claimed.

gaps: Country-specific regulator map must be verified per case.
Platform-country seller route must be verified per case.
Category-specific mandatory evidence must be verified per case.
